title: mallotus monanthos
intro: Mallotus monanthos, also known as the Malayan stinking passion-flower or stinking passion-flower, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. Mallotus monanthos is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Mallotus monanthos are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to treat a range of ailments.
